resource_budget_record.value_hypothesis: A cheap route is not valuable when it shifts cost into future debugging and evidence loss.
resource_budget_record.quality_predicate: Savings cannot be accepted until displaced costs are measured or bounded.
resource_budget_record.escalation_rule: Residualize or reject cheap routes that hide future cost.
residuals: Displaced costs remain residuals until measured.

non_claims: Does not promote any support state.
Does not prove scheduler behavior, runtime behavior, load stability, or economic outcomes.
